ops.title: Never hardcode plugin cache version paths — derive from installed_plugins.json
ops.body: Audit theme PLF-06 (confirmed 2026-07-22, AUDIT-PLF-2026-07): scripts and agents that hardcode `~/.claude/plugins/cache/<mkt>/<plugin>/<version>/...` paths break when the installed version moves (cache is version-keyed; updates swap the dir). Rule: resolve the live path from `installed_plugins.json`'s installPath for the record (or `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` inside a plugin process; `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA` for durable payloads — install-binary.sh's staging pattern). Same class: assuming repo-local `.venv/bin/<tool>` launchers exist, or absolute `/opt/homebrew/bin/<tool>` — probe PATH first. Evidence: d5-error-text + r2c-launcher-drift lanes (9 records, 6+ sessions); adversarially verified, failures ephemeral in-session, so the mitigation is this rule, not automation.
